docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED AUG-11-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, YOUNG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT ON 10/03/18 ORDERED DESTROYED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN (506). PLAINTIFF TASHA NEWTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOUN WILSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, YOUNG
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY NEWTON, TASHA AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, YOUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEWTON, TASHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, YOUNG $5,020.00 PRINCIPAL, $227.38 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,337.38, $5020.00 PLUS COSTS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST ON MEDICAL BILLS ($1520) FROM 4/12/2017. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWTON, TASHA AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, YOUNG
